# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH = 1024 * 1024; // 1MB limit
const MAX_CHUNK_SIZE = 64 * 1024; // 64KB chunks
const ALLOWED_HEADER_PREFIX = 'x-custom-';
const ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES = [
  'text/plain',
  'text/html',
  'application/json',
  'text/event-stream',
  'application/octet-stream',
];

function sanitizeHeaderValue(value: string): string {
  // Remove any characters that could be used for header injection
  return value.replace(/[\r\n\0]/g, '').trim();
}

function isAllowedHeader(key: string): boolean {
  const lowerKey = key.toLowerCase();
  // Only allow custom headers prefixed with x-custom- and content-type
  return lowerKey.startsWith(ALLOWED_HEADER_PREFIX) || lowerKey === 'content-type';
}

function isAllowedContentType(contentType: string): boolean {
  const normalized = contentType.toLowerCase().split(';')[0].trim();
  return ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES.includes(normalized);
}

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (request.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed' }), {
      status: 405,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Allow': 'POST',
      },
    });
  }

  const contentLength = request.headers.get('content-length');
  if (contentLength && parseInt(contentLength, 10) > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Payload too large' }), {
      status: 413,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  let body: { content?: string; headers?: Record<string, string> };

  try {
    const rawBody = await request.text();

    if (rawBody.length > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Payload too large' }), {
        status: 413,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      });
    }

    body = JSON.parse(rawBody);
  } catch {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  if (!body || typeof body !== 'object') {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Request body must be an object' }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  const { content, headers: userHeaders } = body;

  if (content === undefined || content === null) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Content is required' }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  if (typeof content !== 'string') {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Content must be a string' }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  if (content.length > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Content too large' }), {
      status: 413,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  // Build safe response headers
  const responseHeaders = new Headers({
    'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',
    'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate',
    'Connection': 'keep-alive',
    'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
    'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
  });

  if (userHeaders && typeof userHeaders === 'object' && !Array.isArray(userHeaders)) {
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(userHeaders)) {
      if (typeof key !== 'string' || typeof value !== 'string') {
        continue;
      }

      if (!isAllowedHeader(key)) {
        continue;
      }

      const sanitizedValue = sanitizeHeaderValue(value);

      if (key.toLowerCase() === 'content-type') {
        if (isAllowedContentType(sanitizedValue)) {
          responseHeaders.set('Content-Type', sanitizedValue);
        }
      } else {
        // Only set custom headers with safe values
        if (sanitizedValue.length <= 1024) {
          responseHeaders.set(key, sanitizedValue);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const contentBytes = encoder.encode(content);

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    start(controller) {
      let offset = 0;

      function pushChunk() {
        if (offset >= contentBytes.length) {
          controller.close();
          return;
        }

        const end = Math.min(offset + MAX_CHUNK_SIZE, contentBytes.length);
        const chunk = contentBytes.slice(offset, end);
        controller.enqueue(chunk);
        offset = end;

        // Use setTimeout to yield control and enable true streaming
        setTimeout(pushChunk, 0);
      }

      pushChunk();
    },
    cancel() {
      // Stream was cancelled by the client - cleanup is handled automatically
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    status: 200,
    headers: responseHeaders,
  });
}
